idea: An app that reminds elderly patients to take their medication and alerts family if they miss a dose.
A social network exactly like Facebook but with a purple logo.
A marketplace connecting local farmers directly with restaurants to cut out middlemen.
An AI that writes personalized cover letters from a user's CV and a job link.
A blockchain to track how many steps my dog walks per day.
A subscription box that mails a random rock to your door every month.
Speech-to-text tuned for mixed Kazakh-Russian bilingual speech for call-center quality control.
A generic to-do list app with no differentiation from existing ones.
A tool that turns long YouTube videos into short, captioned clips automatically.
An online course platform competing head-on with Coursera and Udemy on price.
A B2B tool that auto-generates compliance reports for SMEs from their raw data.
A dating app only for people who own the same brand of toaster.
Same as Uber but the drivers are all left-handed.
A platform for booking last-minute empty barber chairs at a discount.
AI meeting notes that auto-create tasks in the team's existing project tool.
A luxury water brand sold at 50x the price of tap water with no health claim.
An app to split restaurant bills by scanning the receipt and detecting who ordered what.
A modular ERP for Kazakhstani SMEs competing directly with 1C and Odoo.
A service that finds and cancels a user's unused subscriptions automatically.
A smart fridge that tweets what you eat to your followers.
A tutoring marketplace matching students with vetted university-student tutors by subject.
An NFT collection of hand-drawn potatoes with no utility.
A tool that turns a founder's messy notes into an investor-ready one-pager.
A food delivery app in a city already served by three dominant players, with no new angle.
An AI voice avatar that answers customer FAQs on a company website in real time.
A paid app that tells you the current time, competing with the free phone clock.
A platform that lets small e-commerce shops share one delivery fleet to cut costs.
A calendar app identical to Google Calendar with a different font.
An AI that reviews rental contracts and flags unfair clauses for tenants.
A ride-hailing app for camels aimed at daily commuters in a big city.
